ogTitle: Mulataga vs Mulga Downs: Climate Safety

heading: Mulataga vs Mulga Downs — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mulataga, Western Australia and Mulga Downs, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mulataga has a lower overall climate risk score (25/100) compared to Mulga Downs (31/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mulataga or Mulga Downs safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mulataga has a flood risk score of 36/100, while Mulga Downs scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mulataga scores 18/100 for bushfire risk. Mulga Downs scores 33/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mulataga or Mulga Downs?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mulataga has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.08% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
